title: Tinallian razorcat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Razor|more=Cat}}
'''Tinallian razorcats''' were predatory creatures native to the planet [[Tinallis]]. According to the [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Fendel Ramison]], who awoke one morning to find one clawing through his provisions, they were able to withstand a direct shot from a [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]] without significant injury. In fact, Ramison even reported that the razorcat he shot "just smiled" after being hit.<ref name="COG">''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''</ref>

==Sources==
